description: Update SVG diagrams to reflect v5.5 state. Verify and update hero-banner, architecture, consensus-flow, skills-deploy, and dashboard-preview SVGs.
steps: Read docs/images/hero-banner-baoyu.svg - update title/subtitle text to reflect v5.5 capabilities (currently says 17 personas which is correct, verify all agent boxes match current roster)

Read docs/images/architecture-baoyu.svg - currently says 'Augur v5.4', update to 'Augur v5.5', verify 6-layer architecture is accurate (User Access Layer with all platforms, Core Engine, Persona Agents, Consensus Mechanism, Data Layer, Storage)

Read docs/images/consensus-flow.svg - verify 6-step consensus flow matches actual implementation in registry.py (industry-aware weights, market regime routing, rolling IC, diversity penalty, Kelly sizing, risk veto)
Read docs/images/skills-deploy.svg - verify it shows all current deployment targets (Dashboard, Hermes, CLI, MCP, Telegram, Slack, WeChat, Lark)
Read docs/images/dashboard-preview.svg - verify it represents Bloomberg dark theme UI with correct page structure
Update version references from v5.4 to v5.5 in all SVGs that contain version text
acceptance_criteria: architecture-baoyu.svg says v5.5 instead of v5.4
All SVGs are valid XML (no broken tags)
All platform names in skills-deploy match actual implementations
verification: grep -l 'v5.4' docs/images/*.svg returns empty (no remaining v5.4 references)
python -c "import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; ET.parse('docs/images/architecture-baoyu.svg')" succeeds (valid XML)
